text.value: The html source has duplicate anchor Ids: Identifier,Identifier.assigner,Identifier.extension,Identifier.extension.2,Identifier.id,Identifier.period,Identifier.system,Identifier.type,Identifier.type.coding,Identifier.type.coding.code,Identifier.type.coding.display,Identifier.type.coding.extension,Identifier.type.coding.id,Identifier.type.coding.system,Identifier.type.coding.userSelected,Identifier.type.coding.version,Identifier.type.extension,Identifier.type.id,Identifier.type.text,Identifier.use,Identifier.value

The html source has duplicate anchor Ids: Address,Address.city,Address.city.extension,Address.city.extension.2,Address.city.id,Address.city.value,Address.country,Address.country.extension,Address.country.extension.2,Address.country.id,Address.country.value,Address.district,Address.district.extension,Address.district.extension.2,Address.district.id,Address.district.value,Address.extension,Address.extension.2,Address.extension.3,Address.extension.4,Address.id,Address.line,Address.period,Address.postalCode,Address.state,Address.state.extension,Address.state.extension.2,Address.state.id,Address.state.value,Address.text,Address.type,Address.use

The html source has duplicate anchor Ids: HumanName,HumanName.extension,HumanName.family,HumanName.family.extension,HumanName.family.extension.2,HumanName.family.id,HumanName.family.value,HumanName.given,HumanName.id,HumanName.period,HumanName.prefix,HumanName.suffix,HumanName.text,HumanName.use
The html source has duplicate anchor Ids: HumanName,HumanName.extension,HumanName.family,HumanName.given,HumanName.id,HumanName.period,HumanName.prefix,HumanName.suffix,HumanName.text,HumanName.use
el valor no puede empezar o terminar con espacios en blanco 'Establecimientos según Nivel de Complejidad '
Review the extension type for LimiteUrbano: extensions should not have a context of Element unless it's really intended that they can be used anywhere

The definition for the element 'Extension.value[x]' binds to the value set 'https://interoperabilidad.minsal.cl/fhir/ig/eis/ValueSet/eis-limite-urbano-censal-vs' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental

The definition for the element 'Extension.value[x]' binds to the value set 'https://interoperabilidad.minsal.cl/fhir/ig/eis/ValueSet/eis-limite-urbano-censal-vs' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension

The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/regex|5.2.0 is deprecated with the note: 'This was deprecated in favor of using a constraint on the element using FHIRPath, since constraints allow for the provision of a human readable message associated with the regex'
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension

The definition for the element 'Identifier.type' binds to the value set 'https://interoperabilidad.minsal.cl/fhir/ig/eis/ValueSet/eis-TipodeIdentificador-VS' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental

The definition for the element 'Identifier.type' binds to the value set 'https://interoperabilidad.minsal.cl/fhir/ig/eis/ValueSet/eis-TipodeIdentificador-VS' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
El elemento repetitivo tiene un pattern. El pattern aplicará a todas las repeticiones (esto no ha quedado claro para todos los usuarios)
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this data type profile
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.2.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation|5.2.0'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.2.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation|5.2.0'

The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this data type profile
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this data type profile
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension

The definition for the element 'Extension.value[x]' binds to the value set 'https://interoperabilidad.minsal.cl/fhir/ig/eis/ValueSet/eis-tipo-via-vs' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental

The definition for the element 'Extension.value[x]' binds to the value set 'https://interoperabilidad.minsal.cl/fhir/ig/eis/ValueSet/eis-tipo-via-vs' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension
el valor no puede empezar o terminar con espacios en blanco 'Establecimientos según Nivel de Complejidad '

El nombre de display para urn:iso:std:iso:3166#044 debe ser ''Bahamas (the)'', no 'Bahamas'. Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

El nombre de display para urn:iso:std:iso:3166#068 debe ser ''Bolivia (Plurinational State of)'', no 'Bolivia, Plurinational State of'. Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

El nombre de display para urn:iso:std:iso:3166#086 debe ser ''British Indian Ocean Territory (the)'', no 'British Indian Ocean Territory'. Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

El nombre de display para urn:iso:std:iso:3166#092 debe ser ''Virgin Islands (British)'', no 'Virgin Islands, British'. Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

El nombre de display para urn:iso:std:iso:3166#136 debe ser ''Cayman Islands (the)'', no 'Cayman Islands'. Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

El nombre de display para urn:iso:std:iso:3166#140 debe ser ''Central African Republic (the)'', no 'Central African Republic'. Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code
